_comment: Pipeline configuration for wsf_opl.py Step 2 — WSF-M (Weather Satellite Follow-on) ML soil moisture prediction.

step2_prediction._comment_script: Absolute path to predict_sm_stratified.py (StratifiedSoilMoisturePredictor). wsf_opl.py inserts its parent directory into sys.path at runtime. See ldt/WSF_OPL/prediction/predict_sm_stratified.py in the LISF repo.
step2_prediction._comment_model_dir: Directory containing the 30 per-cluster Random Forest models (rf_cluster_00.pkl through rf_cluster_29.pkl) plus one global fallback RF (rf_global.pkl) used when a per-cluster model is unavailable. Each RF predicts volumetric soil moisture (m3/m3) from 9 WSF-M TB channels: TB_10V, TB_10H, TB_18V, TB_18H, TB_23V, TB_36V, TB_36H, TB_89V, TB_89H. Also expects stratified_config.json (K, feature list, training metadata) in this directory.
step2_prediction._comment_cluster_dir: Directory containing the pre-computed cluster assignment map (environmental_clusters_k30.nc, 2560x1920) and the GMM model (gmm_k30.pkl). The GMM (Gaussian Mixture Model) computes per-pixel posterior probabilities over the 30 clusters based on encoded environmental features; the top-K cluster predictions are then blended using those probabilities as weights — this is soft blending, which removes sharp boundary artifacts compared to hard (nearest-cluster) assignment. Also contains clustering_model_k30.pkl (KMeans + encoders needed to re-encode env layers at startup).
step2_prediction._comment_env_paths: List of paths to the environmental parameter files used for cluster assignment in soft blending mode. Three categories of features are required: (1) land cover — IGBP classes encoded as one-hot vectors; (2) Koppen climate group — 30 climate classes aggregated to 10 groups and one-hot encoded; (3) soil texture fractions — clay, sand, and silt percentages (standardized). These features are not used by the RF models themselves — they are only used to compute GMM cluster membership weights.
step2_prediction._comment_top_k: Number of clusters to blend per pixel in soft mode. The top-K clusters by GMM posterior weight are selected; their RF predictions are weighted-averaged using renormalized GMM probabilities. Default is 3. Set to 1 for hard assignment (equivalent to --hard flag in predict_sm_stratified.py).
step2_prediction._comment_sm_output: Directory where hourly SM output files (ARFS_SM_WSFM_<YYYYMMDD>_t<HH>.nc) are written. This path is also referenced as WSF soil moisture data directory in both the LDT WSF CDF config and the LIS WSF DA config.
